flags.name: --parallel
flags.description: Opt-in parallel story execution via worktrees

flags.name: --legacy-flow
flags.description: Force EPIC-0042 behavior (stories merge directly into develop; no final PR)

flags.name: --phase
flags.description: Execute only stories in phase N

flags.name: --story
flags.description: Execute a single story in isolation

flags.name: --dry-run
flags.description: Produce execution plan only; do not dispatch stories

flags.name: --skip-review
flags.description: Propagate to x-story-implement: skip specialist + tech-lead reviews

flags.name: --auto-merge-strategy
flags.description: Strategy for story-PR auto-merge into epic/<EPIC-ID>

flags.name: --strict-overlap
flags.description: Demote hard-overlap stories to sequential in --parallel mode

flags.name: --non-interactive
flags.description: Skip all AskUserQuestion gates (CI / orchestrated invocations)

flags.name: --skip-pr-comments
flags.description: Skip the post-gate PR-comment remediation pass

flags.name: --revert-on-failure
flags.description: On integrity-gate failure, revert the last story merge instead of dispatching remediation agent

flags.name: --skip-smoke
flags.description: Bypass the epic smoke gate (advisory only)

flags.name: --auto-approve-pr
flags.description: Propagate to x-story-implement for task-PR-into-parent-branch flow

deprecatedFlags.name: --sequential
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --sequential is a no-op (sequential is default since EPIC-0049). Remove the flag.

deprecatedFlags.name: --auto-merge
deprecatedFlags.replacement: Omit flag (auto-merge against epic/<ID> is now default)
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --auto-merge is a no-op (auto-merge against epic/<ID> is default since EPIC-0049). Use --auto-merge-strategy to tune strategy.

deprecatedFlags.name: --no-merge
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --no-merge is rejected in EPIC-0049 defaults. Use --legacy-flow to preserve EPIC-0042 no-direct-merge semantics.

deprecatedFlags.name: --interactive-merge
deprecatedFlags.replacement: Default interactive mode when --non-interactive is absent
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --interactive-merge is a no-op. Interactive behavior is default when --non-interactive is not set.

deprecatedFlags.name: --manual-batch-approval
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --manual-batch-approval is a no-op since EPIC-0043. Use --non-interactive for CI.

deprecatedFlags.name: --batch-approval
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --batch-approval is a no-op since EPIC-0043. Use --non-interactive for CI.

deprecatedFlags.name: --single-pr
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --single-pr is an alias for --legacy-flow. Use --legacy-flow explicitly.

deprecatedFlags.name: --task-tracking
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --task-tracking is always-on in v2. Remove the flag.

deprecatedFlags.name: --dry-run-only-comments
deprecatedFlags.warning: [DEPRECATED] --dry-run-only-comments is a no-op. Use --skip-pr-comments to suppress Phase 4b entirely.
